steps.title: Find the monthly growth rate
steps.content: The tree grows 69 cm every $m$ months, so the rate is $\dfrac{69}{m}$ cm per month.

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content:
The expression $\dfrac{828k}{m}$ comes from dividing by $m$ to get the monthly rate and multiplying by $12k$ months.

That matches Choice D — $\frac{828k}{m}$.
